skill: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
stem: The total mass, in kilograms, of n identical objects is m. Which expression represents the total mass, in kilograms, of 87n of these objects?
rationale: Choice D is correct. If n identical objects have a total mass of m, then each object has mass m/n. Therefore 87n objects have a total mass of 87n × (m/n) = 87m kilograms. Choices A and B are incorrect because they treat 87 and m additively rather than multiplicatively. Choice C is incorrect because m/87 represents dividing rather than multiplying by 87.
